item.name: CreateAuthor
item.description: Creates a new Author.

item.name: GetAllAuthors
item.description: Retrieves all authors.

item.name: GetAuthorById
item.description: Retrieves a Author by its identifier.

item.name: UpdateAuthor
item.description: Updates an existing Author.

item.name: DeleteAuthor
item.description: Deletes an author if the author has no associated books.

item.name: GetAuthorsLookup
item.description: Retrieves a lightweight list of authors for lookup purposes.

item.name: CreateBook
item.description: Creates a new book.

item.name: GetAllBooks
item.description: Retrieves all books.

item.name: GetBookById
item.description: Retrieves a book by its identifier.

item.name: UpdateBookBasicInfo
item.description: Updates an existing book basic info.

item.name: DeleteBook
item.description: Deletes a Book if it has no borrow history.

item.name: UpdateBookAuthors
item.description: Updates an existing book authors .

item.name: UpdateBookCoverImage
item.description: Updates an existing book cover image  .

item.name: GetBookBorrowHistory
item.description: Retrieves the borrowing history of a book.

item.name: BorrowBook
item.description: Borrows a book for a library member.

item.name: GetBorrowingById
item.description: Retrieves a borrowing transaction by its identifier..

item.name: ReturnBorrowing
item.description: Returns a borrowed book by its borrowing transaction identifier.

item.name: GetAllActiveBorrowings
item.description: Retrieves all active borrowings.

item.name: CreateCategory
item.description: Creates a new category.

item.name: GetAllCategories
item.description: Retrieves all categories.

item.name: GetCategoryById
item.description: Retrieves a category by its identifier.

item.name: UpdateCategory
item.description: Updates an existing category.

item.name: DeleteCategory
item.description: Deletes a category if it has no books or subcategories.

item.name: GetCategoryLookup
item.description: Retrieves a lightweight list of categories for lookup purposes.

item.name: UserLogin
item.description: Authenticates a user using email and password and returns a JWT access token.

item.name: CreateMember
item.description: Creates a new Member.

item.name: GetAllMembers
item.description: Retrieves all members.

item.name: GetMemberById
item.description: Retrieves a Member by its identifier.

item.name: UpdateMember
item.description: Updates an existing Member.

item.name: DeleteMember
item.description: Deletes a Member if it has no borrowing history.

item.name: GetMemberBorrowHistory
item.description: Retrieves the borrowing history of a member.

item.name: CreatePublisher
item.description: Creates a new Publisher.

item.name: GetAllPublishers
item.description: Retrieves all publishers.

item.name: GetPublisherById
item.description: Retrieves a Publisher by its identifier.

item.name: UpdatePublisher
item.description: Updates an existing Publisher.

item.name: DeletePublisher
item.description: Deletes a Publisher if it has no books.

item.name: GetpublishersLookup
item.description: Retrieves a lightweight list of publishers for lookup purposes.

item.name: CreateUser
item.description: Creates a new system user (Staff, Librarian, Administrator).

item.name: GetAllUsers
item.description: Retrieves all system users.

item.name: GetUserById
item.description: Retrieves a system user by their identifier.

item.name: UpdateUser
item.description: Updates an existing system user's information and role.

item.name: DeleteUser
item.description: Deletes a system user from the system.
